name: Ilya Belov || New Years Kiss
description:
That champagne buzz down to my toes

Your fiancé's girlfriend's half-brother just stole your New Years kiss!

On the final day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
a drama filled kiss on New Years Eve ♥

It's the annual Moretti New Years party and Giulia Moretti has spared no expense!

The lavish conservatory has been made over to look like a Botticelli painting come to life!

Not that you're having a great time.

Your fiancé, Leonardo Moretti has slipped off with his girlfriend Mischa, leaving you alone in a sea of people you barely know.

While you've always known it wasn't a love match, he could at least not abandon you at his own family's functions!

But it looks like you're not getting a midnight kiss.

Because the clock is counting down and Leo is nowhere to be found.

Only as the clock strikes Midnight, you suddenly find yourself pulled into a dramatic kiss in front of the entire party.

And it's not Leo who kissed you.

It's Ilya Belov.

Notorious Playboy

Half brother of Mischa.

Thorn in Leo's side.

And he looks quite pleased with himself.

Happy New Year!


It's the last bot of 2025! And the last bot of my second advent calendar and folks... someone shake me if around June I'm like "I should do the advent calendar again" cause oof.

It's been a fun but challenging thing to keep up with but i'm pretty proud I didn't miss a single day, even if some original ideas got dropped/altered to make it more manageable for me.

We started this calendar with the dead (sorry) Moretti and we're ending it with everyone's favorite Leo antagonist, Ilya.

If you haven't used Ilya before he has both a solo bot and a duo bot with Leo.

Yapping Below:

2025 has truly been a wild year for me here on Janitor. I started the year with 7k followers and now there is almost 31k of you here with me. I also fully transitioned into making OC content and it truly means everything that people enjoy these characters that I adore.

I never thou
creator: m00nprincess
